data.title: Price predictions for 9/26: Bitcoin, Ethereum, Ripple, Binance Coin, Solana, Dogecoin, Cardano, Hyperlink, Avalanche may see resistance after recovery attempts.
data.description: The price of Bitcoin and other major alternative cryptocurrencies is currently attempting to bounce back, although they are expected to face substantial resistance if they reach higher price points.

data.title: Tennessee duo fined $6.8M for scam promising crypto guidance from "Coach Wendy"; scam exposed.
data.description: Investors were informed by the couple that a supposed investment advisor named "Coach Wendy" would provide guidance on cryptocurrency trades. However, the platform turned out to be fraudulent, and the identity of the advisor remains a mystery.

data.title: Global Membrane Bioreactor market to grow from $4.4B in 2025 to $9.4B by 2030, at 16.1% CAGR. Factors include water scarcity, quality issues, and sustainability.
data.description: The latest study from BCC Research predicts that the global Membrane Bioreactor (MBR) market will grow from $4.4 billion in 2025 to $9.4 billion by 2030, with a compound annual growth rate of 16.1% during this period. The report segments the market based on microbial processes, membrane types, configurations, membrane materials, and end users. It is relevant due to the increasing need for sustainable wastewater treatment technologies, driven by factors like water scarcity, water quality issues, decline in freshwater resources, strict effluent discharge standards, focus on sustainability, and demand for decentralized treatment. Industries and municipalities are turning to MBRs as a reliable solution meeting environmental standards while improving treatment performance. This report provides valuable insights for stakeholders to identify opportunities and make informed decisions in the evolving MBR landscape.

data.title: Saint-Gobain Canada opens North America's largest zero-carbon gypsum wallboard plant in Quebec, solely powered by renewable electricity.
data.description: Today in Montreal, Saint-Gobain Canada celebrated the conclusion of its expansion project at the CertainTeed Gypsum plant in Sainte-Catherine, Quebec. This project has made the plant North America’s foremost zero-carbon gypsum wallboard facility and the global leader in this aspect. The announcement was initially made in 2022, and since then, the plant has undergone significant electrification enhancements to enable it to operate entirely on renewable electricity. This transformation positions the plant as an industry leader in sustainability and environmentally friendly practices.

data.title: Dozens of bipartisan mayors sign "Oklahoma City Declaration" against political violence at deadliest domestic terror attack site.
data.description: Dozens of mayors gathered at the site of the deadliest domestic terror attack in U.S. history in Oklahoma City to sign the "Oklahoma City Declaration". The declaration reaffirms a commitment to American values, including pluralism, compromise, truth, and civility. The event took place on September 26, 2025. The signing symbolizes a strong display of political unity, with a notable presence of mayors supporting these values in a public demonstration of solidarity.
NYMEX Gasoline October futures settle at $2.0376 a gallon.
NYMEX WTI Crude November futures settle at $65.72 a barrel, up 74 cents, 1.14%.

data.title: Ensurge Micropower ASA grants 10,390,000 incentive subscription rights to employees at NOK 1.1829 per share.
data.description: The Board of Directors of Ensurge Micropower ASA has approved granting a total of 10,390,000 incentive subscription rights to specific Ensurge group employees. This grant falls under the Company's 2025 incentive subscription rights plan, endorsed during the Extraordinary General Meeting on 8 August 2025. The exercise price for these rights is set at NOK 1.1829 per share.

data.title: Eurozone business growth remains sluggish at 0.2%, with PMI rising from 51.0 to 51.2 in September. Export sales decline due to tariffs and geopolitical uncertainty, leading to an increase in business pessimism in manufacturing sector. Germany experiences an unexpected decline in exports, while inflation remains low, potentially prompting further interest rates cuts from ECB.
data.description: Eurozone business showed sluggish growth in September, with the HCOB Flash Eurozone Composite Purchasing Managers' Index rising to 51.2 from 51.0 in August. Despite reaching a 16-month high, the growth rate remained slow at 0.2% for the month and the quarter. This was attributed to a slowdown in manufacturing and a loss of export sales due to the fading effect of tariff front-running. Business optimism decreased, with Eurozone exports falling again after stabilizing in May for the first time in 40 months. Germany reported a decline in exports to the US, lowest since 2021. Weak demand has also kept inflation low, potentially leading to further interest rate cuts by the ECB. Germany's growth accelerated, while France's downturn worsened.
NYMEX Natural Gas October futures settle at $2.8350/MMBtu.

data.title: FluidAI Medical's Origin™ device gets FDA 510(k) clearance for real-time postoperative monitoring, redefining patient care.
data.description: Fluid AI Medical has recently announced that their real-time postoperative bedside monitoring device, Origin™, has received FDA 510(k) clearance. This news was shared on 24th September 2025 by the company through a press release. The updated information highlights the approval from the FDA for the innovative device, which signifies a significant milestone for Fluid AI Medical. The clearance of Origin™ demonstrates the company's commitment to advancing healthcare technology and improving patient care.

data.title: Editor Geoffrey Ingersoll's column sparks controversy by urging violence with "blood in the streets" against attacks on conservatives.
data.description: In a recent editorial penned by prominent editor at large Geoffrey Ingersoll, a call to action urging for "blood in the streets" has emerged in response to acts of violence targeting conservatives. The impassioned column discusses the pressing need for a strong and forceful reaction to such incidents, emphasizing the severity of the situation. The provocative language used in the piece has sparked debate and garnered attention, drawing focus on the escalating tensions surrounding attacks on individuals holding conservative beliefs. The article has quickly gained traction, resonating with readers and prompting discussions on the significance of standing up against violence directed towards conservatives.

data.title: LaFleur Minerals Inc. presents opportunity for investors with the current high gold prices. News released on InvestorWire.
data.description: LaFleur Minerals Inc. (CSE: LFLR) (OTCQB: LFLRF) (FSE: 3WK0) revealed its feature in an editorial released by NetworkNewsWire, a part of the Dynamic Brand Portfolio @ IBN. This platform caters to financial news and content distribution for various companies and investors. With over 70 brands under its umbrella, NNW is a specialized communications tool that offers exposure to a wide audience. The editorial highlights LaFleur Minerals Inc.'s current position in the market and is aimed at enhancing its visibility among potential investors.

data.title: Pfizer faces court over Depo-Provera brain tumor claims, with a key hearing in September. Lawsuit filed in Florida for women affected by intracranial meningiomas. Company accused of inadequate warnings.
data.description: Pfizer Inc. is currently facing increasing legal challenges related to its contraceptive injection Depo-Provera (DMPA), with allegations of a link to brain tumors. A crucial court hearing is scheduled for late September to determine if affected women can proceed with their cases. The multidistrict litigation (MDL) in Florida represents women who developed intracranial meningiomas after using Depo-Provera. The plaintiffs claim Pfizer did not adequately warn about the potential risks, while the company argues that federal law supersedes state-level failure-to-warn claims. Additionally, Pfizer's efforts to enhance its obesity portfolio with a $5 billion Matsera deal have been highlighted.

data.title: Quantum stocks fluctuate this week, some reaching all-time highs while others pull back. Analysts predict market value to hit $4 billion by 2030, with bullish coverage from BofA Securities and B. Riley.
data.description: Some quantum stocks saw a pullback from all-time highs as investors shifted away from speculative names this week. However, others maintained their upward momentum as the sector continued to be in the spotlight. QBTS stock is currently on the rise. Analysts from BofA Securities and B. Riley updated their bullish coverage on quantum stocks, with BofA predicting the quantum computing market to reach a value of around $4 billion by 2030. They expect a significant increase in revenues around the same time, emphasizing that the potential of quantum computing is substantial. B. Riley analyst Craig Ellis raised price targets for the quantum sector, highlighting the industry's rapid technological advancements and commercial successes. The full article can be accessed on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Toll Brothers to launch Crestwood Ranch luxury home community in Las Vegas, NV with estate-sized homes in a serene setting.
data.description: Crestwood Ranch is set to introduce estate-sized homes in a tranquil northwest community. Featuring spacious properties and a peaceful environment, the development is expected to cater to discerning buyers looking for a serene living experience in the area. With a range of ample-sized homes available, Crestwood Ranch aims to provide a luxurious housing option for those seeking upscale living in the northwest region.

data.title: The Dow Jones rises on Friday post Fed inflation data; 2 bitcoin mining stocks fall after J.P. Morgan downgrade.
data.description: On Friday, the Dow Jones index experienced an increase following the release of inflation data by the Federal Reserve. However, two stocks related to bitcoin mining saw a decline due to a downgrade from J.P. Morgan. The stock market today showed the Dow leading in an afternoon rally. This live coverage highlighted the impact of the Fed data on market performance, as well as the specific influence of the bitcoin-related stock downgrades.

data.title: BayCare in Clearwater, Florida, wins Florida Nurses Association Icon Award for outstanding nursing practice.
data.description: In Clearwater, Florida, on September 26, 2025, BayCare was honored with the Promoting Environment for Excellence in Nursing Practice Icon Award by the Florida Nurses Association (FNA). This prestigious award acknowledges BayCare's outstanding dedication to providing exceptional nursing care. This recognition highlights the health system's commitment to excellence in nursing practice.
